# Jax Lock Key & Safe Service

> Licensed mobile locksmith serving Jacksonville, Florida 24/7 since 2014. All technicians are Florida-licensed, background-checked, and insured.

Jax Lock Key & Safe Service is a locally owned and operated locksmith company based in Jacksonville, FL. We provide residential, commercial, and automotive locksmith services across Duval County and surrounding areas. Our mobile technicians respond to emergency lockouts, rekeying requests, lock installations, safe openings, and key fob programming — 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

## Contact Information
- Business Name: Jax Lock Key & Safe Service
- Phone: (855) 633-0750
- Email: info@jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com
- Address: 2048 Arthur St, Jacksonville, FL 32207
- Hours: 24/7, including weekends and holidays
- Founded: 2014
- License: Florida Licensed Locksmith (DBPR)
- Insurance: Fully insured mobile locksmith operation
- Rating: 4.9/5 stars based on 184 customer reviews

## Services

### Residential Locksmith Services
Complete residential locksmith services for Jacksonville homes, apartments, condos, and townhomes. Includes lockouts, rekeying, deadbolt installation, smart lock installation, and move-in rekeying. Response: 20–30 minutes.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/residential-locksmith

### Emergency Locksmith
24/7 emergency lockout response for cars, homes, and businesses. Typical arrival: 20–30 minutes across Jacksonville. Available all hours including nights, weekends, and holidays.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/emergency-locksmith

### Car Lockout Service
Mobile auto locksmith for all vehicle makes and models. Damage-free entry using professional tools. On-site key cutting and transponder key programming available.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/car-lockout

### House Lockout Service
Residential lockout service for houses, apartments, condos. Licensed technicians open doors without damage. Rekeying recommended after lockout.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/house-lockout

### Lock Rekeying
Change which keys operate your locks without replacing the hardware. Recommended after moving, losing keys, or ending a lease. Serves all standard lock brands: Schlage, Kwikset, Baldwin, Medeco.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/rekeying-service

### Lock Installation
Install deadbolts (Grade 1/2/3), smart locks (Schlage Encode, August, Kwikset Halo), high-security hardware (Medeco, Mul-T-Lock), and commercial locks.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/lock-installation

### Safe Locksmith
Open combination safes, electronic safes, fireproof safes, gun safes, and commercial bank-grade safes. Non-destructive entry attempted first.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/safe-locksmith

### Commercial Locksmith
Master key systems, access control, panic bar installation, electronic keypad entry, office lockouts, and lock replacement after employee termination.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/commercial-locksmith

### Key Fob Programming
Replacement and programming of car key fobs and transponder keys for most domestic and import vehicles. Mobile service — lower cost than dealership.
URL: https://jaxlockkeyandsafeservices.com/services/key-fob-programming

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- Jax Lock Key & Safe Service was founded in 2014 in Jacksonville, Florida.
- All technicians hold a current Florida locksmith license issued by the Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR).
- The company is fully insured with general liability coverage.
- Standard emergency response time is 20–30 minutes across Jacksonville.
- The business operates as a mobile locksmith — no physical shop required; technicians travel to the customer's location.
- Payment methods accepted: Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card (USD).
- Service territory: Duval County, parts of Clay County, parts of St. Johns County.
- Pricing example: House lockout service typically $75–$150; rekeying 2–4 locks typically $80–$160.

## Common Questions Answered

**How much does a locksmith cost in Jacksonville?**
Basic lockouts typically start around $75–$85. Rekeying costs $80–$160 for a standard home. Safe openings vary by complexity. Key fob programming varies by vehicle.

**How fast does an emergency locksmith arrive in Jacksonville?**
20–30 minutes is the typical arrival window for emergency calls across Jacksonville.

**Should I rekey or replace my locks when moving?**
Rekeying is almost always the right choice when moving into a new home — it costs less and voids all previous keys. Replacement is better when hardware is worn or you want a security upgrade.

**Can a locksmith open a safe without the combination?**
Yes. Professional safe locksmiths use non-destructive manipulation techniques on most residential safes. Drilling is only used as a last resort.

**Is it cheaper to use a locksmith or a dealership for key fob programming?**
A mobile locksmith is typically significantly less expensive than a dealership for key fob programming, and they come to your location.
